3138380.name: Throneheir
3138380.description:
PRESENTATION

This is a classic old-school 2D fantasy RPG in the style of Vagrant Hearts and Midnight's Curse.

As the Champion of Avalon Kingdom, the knight Jethro is entrusted with the task of raising and training Prince Magnus, he who carries in his blood the prophecy that shall set the Kingdom free.

On his journey to prepare the young Prince, he will learn about fatherhood, love and betrayal. All the while forces threatens to destroy what Avalon took centuries to build.

FEATURES

  • A beautiful storyline spawning through 20 years of the characters' lives

  • A moving narrative that touches on the most important aspects of human life

  • 5 playable characters

  • 15 to 20 hours of gameplay

  • Mouse Support
